# Upgrade Plan

## Overview

Upgrade **PhotoAlbum-Java** to the latest LTS versions: **Java 21** and **Spring Boot 3.4**.

This upgrade includes:
- JDK upgrade to Java 21 (latest LTS)
- Spring Boot upgrade to 3.4
- Spring Framework upgrade to 6.x
- Jakarta EE migration (javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces)
- Dependency updates for Spring Boot 3.4 compatibility

## Tasks

See [tasks.json](./tasks.json) for detailed task breakdown.

| # | Task | Type | Status |
|---|------|------|--------|
| 001 | Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4 | upgrade | pending |
